prompt:
Goal: Create a photorealistic wide-angle image of a Japanese urban train station platform featuring a full special anime-themed wrapped train for HANA, branded as a limited memorial line.

Canvas: 16:9 landscape photo, bright daytime, realistic station lighting, crisp details, slightly wide perspective from the platform looking along the side of the stopped train.

Scene and layout: A lavender-purple commuter train is stopped at platform 2, filling most of the frame from left foreground to right background. The train exterior is completely wrapped in soft pastel hydrangea flowers, sparkles, raindrops, and large character branding. The front of the train is visible on the left with a dark windshield and destination display. The side of the train shows a huge portrait of a young anime-style girl with short light-blonde bob hair, a small white flower hair accessory, a gray off-shoulder shirt, and a privacy-style flat rectangular blur covering the face. The side also contains very large Japanese text 「花奈」 with the Roman name “HANA” below it, plus the slogan 「会いに行ける、うちの子。」 and a gold commemorative seal. Doors and windows are integrated into the wrap.

Count and place exactly 6 prominent branded elements: 1) the train front destination display reading 「花奈 記念運行」, 「本日限定運行」, and “SPECIAL WRAPPED TRAIN”; 2) a circular lavender sign mounted on the front of the train reading 「花奈」 and “HANA”; 3) the enormous anime portrait on the train side; 4) the large side title 「花奈」 with “HANA” and the slogan; 5) a black overhead station sign reading “HANA Limited Memorial Line”, 「花奈　記念運行」, 「本日限定運行」, and “SPECIAL WRAPPED TRAIN”; 6) a tall pillar poster on the right showing the same character, the name 「花奈」, “HANA”, and matching lavender branding.

Additional platform details: Include a large matching floor decal near the bottom center reading 「花奈」 and “HANA” with hydrangea decoration. Add a platform number sign “2” on the left. Show overhead beams, electrical wires, rails, tiled platform floor, tactile yellow safety paving, and city buildings beyond the tracks.

People: Include exactly 1 main passenger standing on the platform near the train doors, seen from behind, wearing a white top, long dark skirt, white sneakers, and a black backpack, holding up a smartphone to photograph the wrapped train. Include a small cluster of 3 additional passengers near the open doors in the mid-background, subtle and secondary.

Visual style: Photorealistic promotional railway photography blended with anime character wrap art, high-resolution, natural sunlight, clean Japanese station atmosphere, pastel lavender and hydrangea color palette, realistic reflections on train windows and metal surfaces.

Constraints: Keep all major text legible, preserve the Japanese branding exactly where specified, avoid extra logos or watermarks, do not add unrelated vehicles, keep the face on the large character portrait intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular blur.
